data.content: Planning complete for max concurrent sessions configurability. The value is hardcoded to 5 in two files: terminal-manager.ts:65 and beats/page.tsx:32. Plan adds a maxConcurrentSessions field to the settings schema (default 5, range 1-20), creates a UI section following the defaults-section pattern, and wires both consumption sites to read from settings. Low complexity, backward-compatible (schema default handles existing configs). No child knots needed — single deliverable.
